title: Agent Task
description: Schema for bounded task files in ops/agent/queue/. Each task is a self-contained work unit that an agent can execute from files alone, without prior chat context.

kind.description: Task category. Extend this enum as new kinds emerge.

milestone.description: Milestone ID this task belongs to, e.g. M001.

summary.description: One-sentence description of what done means.

files.description: Paths the worker is expected to read or modify.

out_of_scope.description: Explicit boundaries. Worker must not touch these.

context.description: Context-loading hints so agents can budget their context window.

required_reads.description: Files the worker must read before starting. Listed in read order.

optional_reads.description: Files useful but not required. Load if context budget allows.

estimated_input_lines.description: Approximate total lines of required context. Multiply by ~40 for rough token estimate.

decision_refs.description: Stable decision IDs (D*) that constrain this task.

open_question_refs.description: Open question IDs (O*) that may block or shape this task.

artifacts.description: Paths to files the worker should create or update.

side_effects.description: Non-file outcomes (e.g. 'update catalog.json', 'propagate decision D42 to specs').

commands.description: Shell commands to run after the task. All must exit 0.

escalate_if.description: Conditions that should stop autonomous work and return control to a human.
